form.formComment: Having third race start. At long odds at debut, sat on the pace before fading second last of 10 at Towong Mdn-Sw on March 7 over 1400m, slow going 13 len behind Left On Read carrying 59.5kg at $31. Last start second last of 14 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1300m, 5 len behind Power And The Beat carrying 59.5kg at $151. Improvement to come is worth including in calculations.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. Finished off last preparation fifth of 14 at Swan Hill Mdn-Sw November 23 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Manhattan Mabs carrying 58kg at $2.30. On debut third in a small field at Pakenham 3yo Mdn-Sw November 7 over 1400m, soft track; 7 len behind Jenni Gone Bonkers carrying 58kg at $8. Has claims if presented on song.
